description: Balanced economic resilience across resistance recovery adaptation transformation equity institutions and implementation burden.
Prioritizes shock absorption buffers redundancy financial stability supply continuity and resistance to immediate disruption.
Prioritizes speed and quality of restoring employment firms public services credit and essential economic functions.
Prioritizes learning innovation workforce mobility firm adaptation and structural adjustment.
Prioritizes transition away from obsolete fragile extractive or climate-vulnerable economic structures.
Prioritizes vulnerable households workers small firms marginalized communities and distributional recovery.
Prioritizes public capacity fiscal readiness coordination regulation and institutional legitimacy.
Penalizes implementation burden when administrative finance legal or political capacity is constrained.
